agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Audit and report issues for this suite.

findings.title: Inconsistent Login Terminology
findings.description: The terms 'Sign in', 'Log in', and 'Open login' are used interchangeably across authentication components.
findings.impact: The terms 'Sign in', 'Log in', and 'Open login' are used interchangeably across authentication components.

suggested_fix.approach: Use a single consistent term for the login action (e.g., 'Log In').

findings.title: Inconsistent Save Terminology
findings.description: 'Save Changes', 'Save', and 'Automatically save changes' are used with varying casing and patterns.
findings.impact: 'Save Changes', 'Save', and 'Automatically save changes' are used with varying casing and patterns.

suggested_fix.approach: Standardize casing and phrasing for fundamental actions like save.

findings.title: Placeholder Text in Production
findings.description: Found 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.' text strings exposed in UI weight definitions.
findings.impact: Found 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.' text strings exposed in UI weight definitions.

suggested_fix.approach: Remove lorem ipsum placeholders and replace with real copy.

findings.title: Missing Error Boundaries
findings.description: Major sections like ProjectsPage, SettingsPage, and Admin Metrics lack error boundaries. Only WorkspacePage implements one.
findings.impact: Major sections like ProjectsPage, SettingsPage, and Admin Metrics lack error boundaries. Only WorkspacePage implements one.

suggested_fix.approach: Wrap major route components in ErrorBoundary to prevent full app crashes.

findings.title: Unhelpful Empty States
findings.description: Workspace empty state notes it is 'intentional, not instructional' with no guidance for the user on what to do next.
findings.impact: Workspace empty state notes it is 'intentional, not instructional' with no guidance for the user on what to do next.

suggested_fix.approach: Empty states should guide the user toward their first action.

findings.title: Unhelpful Image Alt Text
findings.description: Images use unhelpful alt text like 'Generated' or just '{asset.name}' directly without providing structural context for screen readers.
findings.impact: Images use unhelpful alt text like 'Generated' or just '{asset.name}' directly without providing structural context for screen readers.

suggested_fix.approach: Provide descriptive alt text distinguishing purpose and meaning for screen readers.

findings.title: Undefined Product Voice
findings.description: The intended product voice and tone are not explicitly defined in the observed design tokens or documentation.

proof_hooks.summary: Product voice and tone not explicitly documented in observed assets.

findings.impact: The intended product voice and tone are not explicitly defined in the observed design tokens or documentation.

suggested_fix.approach: Propose and document a default voice guide (e.g., clear, concise, professional).

next_actions.action: Standardize authentication and system action terminology across the app's components.
Implement ErrorBoundary components at the route component level in App.tsx.
Draft a product voice guide to align on tone, personality, and capitalization conventions.
Update workspace empty states to include clear primary calls-to-action.
Audit all tags and update alt attributes to be meaningful.
